decisions_made.decision: Use git merge --ff-only origin/main instead of git reset --hard origin/main for Phase 1 sync
decisions_made.rationale: Hook blocked --hard. ff-only is the safer expression of identical intent (zero local commits ahead, fast-forward-or-fail) and the hook does not flag it.

decisions_made.decision: Copy .env and migrations/.applied.json byte-identical from OneDrive rather than reconstruct from pm2 env
decisions_made.rationale: OneDrive's .env was readable (cloud-stub theory wrong; only Git's chdir failed, file reads worked). Byte-identical copy is provably equivalent; reconstruction from pm2 env would risk missing keys.

decisions_made.decision: Rename pm2 process claudeclaw → claudeclaw-main via the new ecosystem.config.cjs
decisions_made.rationale: The codebase already uses the new name in ecosystem.config.cjs and every script. Live pm2 was on the bare name from a pre-ecosystem manual start. Cutover is the natural moment to align.

decisions_made.decision: Engage halt programmatically via direct poly_kv UPSERT (not via Telegram /poly halt)
decisions_made.rationale: Same SQL path as the Telegram command (writeHaltFlag in src/poly/telegram-commands.ts:456). Avoids depending on the operator being available for a Telegram round-trip mid-cutover.

decisions_made.decision: Use bot's schedule-cli for the verification + Phase 7 routines, not harness CronCreate
decisions_made.rationale: schedule-cli writes to SQLite (deterministically durable). Harness CronCreate(durable: true) silently fell back to session-only on this install; would die when this session ends, well before the 24h fire time.
